subject: [PATCH] firmware_loader: allow firmware_class.path to take multiple paths

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Requested documentation for the firmware_loader subsystem and suggested changing the separator from ';' to ':'.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: Patch allows firmware_class.path to take multiple paths, but author plans to change the separator from ';' to ':' and post a v2 soon.
